author.bio:

author.name: Mat Kelly

content.text: Time to try @IPFSbot Desktop again, as it's been since the "Station" naming that I've given it a spin. Glad to see the move away from the UI with breathable whitespace to a more native UI approach, at least in the Finder/Explorer.
content.html: Time to try @IPFSbot Desktop again, as it's been since the "Station" naming that I've given it a spin. Glad to see the move away from the UI with breathable whitespace to a more native UI approach, at least in the Finder/Explorer.
